name: Eccles Cakes
recipeIngredient: Milk and castor sugar (superfine) for glazing
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 425°F (second rack from top).
1. Make Rough Puff Pastry as per the previous recipe.
2. Prepare the filling by melting margarine in a saucepan and stirring in the other ingredients. Allow to cool.
3. Roll out the pastry thinly on a floured board. Cut into rounds using a well-floured 3.5-inch cutter.
4. Place a heaped teaspoon of filling in the center of each round.
5. Wet the edges with water, then fold the outside edge over the filling and press together at the top to seal.
6. Turn the cakes so that the sealed ends are underneath. Gently roll each into flat rounds.
7. Transfer to a baking sheet. Allow to rest in a cool place for 15 minutes.
8. Make three slits across the top of each cake. Brush with milk and sprinkle thickly with castor sugar.
9. Bake in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes. Cool on a wire rack.
Makes 16 Eccles cakes
Shared by Sylvia Mease (Cookie Lady)
